Contact Profile: <From Bulldog> McDonald handles news items that directly impact lower Fairfield County. "We're a news and information station that super-serves lower Fairfield County," he says. "I'm very much looking for who, what, where, when and we'll take it from there. We have a substantial list of experts that cover a wide variety of topics, so I'm not looking for experts" from out of state. "Provide me with facts about news items that are going on," he says. Avoid pitching items such as new books or medical breakthroughs. Contact by email.
